description: Grapefruit and grapefruit juice can increase the concentration of statin medications in your blood, potentially causing serious side effects.

message: Limit Vitamin K Foods with Warfarin
description: Foods high in vitamin K can reduce the effectiveness of warfarin. Maintain consistent intake of these foods.
Alcohol consumption while taking metformin can increase the risk of lactic acidosis.

message: Take Iron Supplements Away from Calcium
description: Calcium can interfere with iron absorption. Take iron supplements at least 2 hours before or after calcium-rich foods.
High potassium foods can cause dangerous potassium levels when taking ACE inhibitors.
Licorice can increase the risk of digoxin toxicity and irregular heart rhythms.

message: Take Thyroid Medication on Empty Stomach
description: Food can interfere with thyroid medication absorption. Take on empty stomach and wait 1 hour before eating.
Excessive caffeine can increase side effects of stimulant medications like anxiety and heart palpitations.
